title: The simulation is abnormally ended
body:
When there is only the main process. Use the semaphore.get() to get the key, and when the key is insufficient, the simulation ends abnormally. As described in IEEE document 15.3.3
> If the specfied number of keys is not available, the process blocks until the keys become available.

Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, completely self-contaned so can directly run what you provide. Ideally use test_regress format, see https://veripool.org/guide/latest/contributing.html?highlight=test_regress#reporting-bugs
```systemverilog
module sema_test;
    initial begin
        semaphore sem = new(1);
        sem.get(2);
        #100;
        $display("test end");
    end
endmodule

```

What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?
```bash
$VERILATOR_ROOT/bin/verilator  --binary -top sema_test sema_test.sv;./obj_dir/Vsema_test
```

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?
```
rev v5.034-81-g464e19caa
```
What OS and distribution are you using?

Macos Sequoia 15.3.2
